title: Routes execution policy/queue/runtime-shape lane precheck
delta_summary: adds project-level execution policy guard and per-project queue endpoint
adds runtime-shape shim (_session_runtime) for graph_runtime/colony_runtime compatibility
adds client_message_id/source metadata propagation into queen event bus
normalizes cancellation outcome handling (True|cancelled) across pause/stop paths
switches manager access to typed APP_KEY_MANAGER contract

risk_signals.evidence: new trigger queue semantics (202 queued) and /api/projects/{project_id}/queue endpoint
risk_signals.impact: client-side handling for trigger conflicts/queue state may drift

risk_signals.evidence: runtime selection now supports graph_runtime and colony_runtime
risk_signals.impact: session-shape regressions possible if branch assumptions diverge

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'queue_if_busy or max_concurrent_runs or client_message_id' -q
uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'trigger or pause or stop or replay' -q
uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_telegram_bridge.py -k 'session status or run' -q
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if queue/policy/runtime-shape features are validated and stable in API contract tests
